headline: Delta Air Lines entered into a definitive agreement with Airbus to purchase 31 widebody aircraft, with options for 20 more, with deliveries beginning in 2029.
investor_impact: This fleet expansion secures Delta's long-term widebody capacity and modernization strategy without altering near-term capex guidance. The secured long-term financing and alignment with existing capacity targets provide visibility into the company's international growth plans starting in 2029.
key_figures: Option to purchase up to an additional 20 widebody aircraft
Trent 7000 and Trent XWB-84 EP engines manufactured by Rolls-Royce
